summary: SovereignEngine v2.0 testing complete. All 11 backend API tests passed (1 skipped due to insufficient dust). Frontend Alchemy tab fully functional with correct tier dynamics display. STOP button position fix verified - now at bottom-right (bottom: 85px, right: 15px) and not blocking content.
critical_code_review_comments: SovereignEngine v2.0 implementation is correct with proper Fibonacci accrual ratios (0.09, 0.236, 0.382, 0.618)
Phi Cap ceiling (1.618x) correctly limits output
Scholarship Tax correctly applied per tier (SEED: 15%, SOVEREIGN: 0%)
STOP button CSS position consolidated correctly in EmergencyShutOff.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: SovereignEngine v2.0 fully tested. New endpoints /transmute and /work-submit working correctly. Alchemy tab on /liquidity-trader shows tier dynamics (accrual rate, scholarship tax, phi cap) with live preview calculator. STOP button position fix verified on /sovereign-hub and /hub pages.

api_verification.GET /api/transmuter/status: PASS - Returns tier_dynamics, all_tier_dynamics, scholarship_tax_rate, tier_ratios
api_verification.POST /api/transmuter/transmute: PASS - Fibonacci alchemy with Phi Cap and tier-based tax
api_verification.POST /api/transmuter/work-submit: PASS - Unified work endpoint with Fibonacci dampening

frontend_verification.Liquidity Trader Alchemy Tab: PASS - Shows accrual rate (23.6% for SEED), scholarship tax (15.0%), phi cap (1.618)
frontend_verification.Alchemy Preview Calculator: PASS - Shows input, gross, after phi cap, tax, net result
frontend_verification.STOP Button Position: PASS - Fixed at bottom: 85px, right: 15px (bottom-right corner)
frontend_verification.STOP Button on /sovereign-hub: PASS - Not blocking content, position verified
frontend_verification.STOP Button on /hub: PASS - Not blocking content, position verified
